purpose: Machine-readable instructions for locating repository data, understanding what each folder serves, and deciding which datasets are authoritative versus derived or report-only.

machine_protocol.authoritative_market_data_rule: Use the official NSE downloader path and raw files under data/raw/nse_full_history_official as the v1 market-data source of truth.
forbidden_assumptions: Do not silently substitute unofficial market data for official NSE market data.
Do not fabricate missing fields or unavailable datasets.
Do not infer units from suffixes such as _pct.
Do not treat tmp/, reports/, or cached ML panels as canonical source data.
inspection_order: 1. Open the target folder README.md when present.
2. Open the file's matching .manifest.json sidecar when present.
3. Open the canonical data_contracts/*.yaml contract for the table.
4. Only then inspect the raw file content.

lag_rules.rule: should remain blocked for historical daily joins until published_date timing is resolved
backward-only as-of joins; future-dated records are invalid

folder_catalog.purpose: Run-time configuration for research, expert, weekly production, and screening thresholds.
Schema, grain, update-frequency, and lag-rule contracts for canonical tables.
Human-readable storage, lag, ingestion, and source-limitation documentation.
Ingestion, transformation, ML, screening, reporting, and portfolio-state logic.
Regression, contract, ingestion, transform, and state workflow tests.
Official NSE 2015+ daily market-data partitions by trade date.
notes: This is the authoritative v1 market-data ingestion root.
Pre-2020 delivery-aware features require the matching MTO delivery file.

folder_catalog.purpose: Older or partial raw NSE history materializations kept alongside official-history work.
notes: Prefer data/raw/nse_full_history_official for official market-history usage.

folder_catalog.purpose: Current/raw NSE fetch workspace for direct ingestion operations.
Sampled raw NSE partitions used for smoke tests or reduced-scope experiments.
Research-ready daily fact tables derived from official inputs and formulas.
notes: stock_daily_facts_adjusted_2015plus.parquet is adjusted and heavily used by current ML configs.
daily_facts_official_2015_2026.parquet is the official-price derived table without that naming implying adjustment.

folder_catalog.purpose: Raw NSE quarterly-results pulls, detail payloads, listing snapshots, and error captures.
Normalized quarterly fundamentals table and related variants.
Raw NSE shareholding pattern, public-shareholder detail, promoter pledge, and related error captures.
Normalized quarterly shareholding pattern table.
Alternative hybrid shareholding materialization kept for experiments or recovery workflows.
Alternative master-only shareholding materialization kept for experiments or targeted workflows.
Raw NSE corporate announcements pulls.
Normalized announcements table plus derived event_feature_daily table.
Raw NSE bulk and block deal pulls.
Normalized bulk and block deals table.
Raw NSE insider/promoter transaction pulls.
Normalized insider-trades table.
Raw macro and index series pulls from NSE and FRED.
notes: Includes raw/nse_index_history, raw/nse_index_yield, raw/nse_vix_history, and raw/fred.

folder_catalog.purpose: Normalized macro feature tables including daily features and long-form series.
Raw corporate-action inputs used for split/bonus adjustment workflows.
Normalized corporate actions table.
Raw derivatives open-interest and MWPL source files when successfully fetched.
notes: This source is known to be incomplete or unavailable in some runs; do not fabricate missing OI.

folder_catalog.purpose: Cached feature panels and metadata keyed by config/objective fingerprint.
notes: Useful for reproducibility and speed, but not a source-of-truth dataset.

folder_catalog.purpose: Expert pipeline outputs such as OOF predictions, calibration tables, and universe summaries.
Research-run outputs and experiment artifacts.
Durable state for confirmed holdings, execution ledger, and workflow settings.
Reserved top-level normalized folder; currently empty.
Dated run folders for reports, backtests, RCA, live sheets, and review outputs.
notes: Each important CSV or parquet should have a matching .manifest.json sidecar.
Use the folder README.md and summary.json first.

folder_catalog.purpose: Scratch folders, smoke tests, temporary normalized materializations, and investigation outputs.
notes: Do not use as canonical source data unless a workflow explicitly names a tmp path.

canonical_datasets.name: stock_daily_facts_adjusted_2015plus
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per trade_date
canonical_datasets.source_authority: derived from official NSE raw market data plus internal adjustment and feature logic
canonical_datasets.usage_note: Widely used by current ML research configs; derived and adjusted, not raw truth.

canonical_datasets.name: daily_facts_official_2015_2026
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per trade_date
canonical_datasets.source_authority: derived from official NSE raw market data
canonical_datasets.usage_note: Prefer this when you need official-price daily facts without relying on the adjusted naming path.

canonical_datasets.name: stock_master
canonical_datasets.source_authority: official NSE quote/meta APIs plus optional approved mapping file
canonical_datasets.stability: no single stable canonical path under data currently

canonical_datasets.name: stock_quarterly_fundamentals
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol, fiscal_period_end, effective_from_date

canonical_datasets.name: stock_shareholding_quarterly
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol, quarter_end, effective_from_date

canonical_datasets.name: macro_feature_daily
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per trade_date for broad market and cross-asset features
canonical_datasets.source_authority: normalized NSE and FRED macro inputs

canonical_datasets.name: stock_announcements
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per announcement event

canonical_datasets.name: stock_bulk_block_deals
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol, trade_date, client, side, and deal line

canonical_datasets.name: stock_insider_trades
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per insider filing event

canonical_datasets.name: event_feature_daily
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per trade_date
canonical_datasets.source_authority: derived from announcements, insider, bulk/block, and optional derivatives OI

canonical_datasets.name: stock_corporate_actions
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per corporate action event

canonical_datasets.name: daily_screen_universe
canonical_datasets.path: materialized in memory by screen builder; no single canonical file path
canonical_datasets.grain: one row per symbol per trade_date
canonical_datasets.source_authority: latest lag-valid joins from daily facts, fundamentals, shareholding, sector flow, and derived booleans

7-day objective studies, backtests, live sheets, challenger comparisons, and gating runs
